violations.text: The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
The door to the unisex toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The receptacle in the unisex toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
